title: Do NOT call the broadcast entity SmsGroup
problem: SmsGroup implies SMS-only. The broadcast entity carries Email, Voice, E-boks deliveries too. Misleading from day 1.
green_ai_rule: Name it: Broadcast (or Campaign / Dispatch). Multi-channel is first-class — the name must reflect it.

title: Do NOT store all channel deliveries in one SmsLog table
problem: SmsLog stores SMS AND Email AND Voice deliveries using a channel discriminator. Causes confusion, index inefficiency, GDPR query complexity.
green_ai_rule: DeliveryRecord (or MessageDelivery) with Channel as a typed first-class concept. Each channel may have its own carrier-specific extension object.

title: Do NOT put business logic in stored procedures
problem: Core send path (GetSmsLogMergeModel* family) is in SPs: impossible to unit test, hard to version, hard to trace.
green_ai_rule: C# only for all business logic. SPs only for bulk data operations where batch insert performance justifies it, with explicit carve-out documentation.

title: Do NOT store API keys plaintext
problem: ProfileApiKeys stores raw API key value. DB breach = all keys exposed.
green_ai_rule: Store: SHA256(key) only. Return plaintext exactly once at creation. Cannot be retrieved again — only regenerated.

title: Do NOT design address restrictions as a KVHX list
problem: Profile address restrictions as list of allowed KVHX values doesn't scale and is Denmark-only.
green_ai_rule: Design country-agnostic address scoping from day 1. Candidates: geo-polygon, municipality IDs, custom named scope. Decision deferred to address_management planning pass.
sms_service_evidence: Address restriction model uses KVHX FK ranges

title: Do NOT allow a second ICurrentUser implementation
problem: Two parallel WebWorkContext implementations diverged over years (Api=DB-primary, Contracts=JWT-primary). No single truth.
green_ai_rule: ICurrentUser + CurrentUserMiddleware = the only path. Hard rule: if a second implementation appears in a PR, it is rejected.

title: Do NOT call carrier APIs directly in background services
problem: Direct GatewayAPI, Infobip SDK calls in background services. Cannot swap carriers or test without live credentials.
green_ai_rule: ICarrierClient<TChannel> abstraction. Each carrier is an injectable adapter. FakeCarrierClient for tests. Carrier-specific code is isolated behind the adapter boundary.

title: Index ActivityLog by ResourceKey from day 1
problem: Searching activity log by ResourceKey for compliance audit requires full table scan if unindexed.
green_ai_rule: CREATE INDEX IX_ActivityLogEntries_ResourceKey_DateCreated ON ActivityLogEntries(ResourceKey, DateCreated DESC) — included in initial migration.
sms_service_evidence: ActivityLogEntries table — no index on ResourceKey
